nf/quick-397-build-a-command-to-run-nf-s.task_description: build a command to run nf:solve against nf-benchmark to validate its capacity to solve issues automatically
nf/quick-397-build-a-command-to-run-nf-s.approach: Create a command-line utility that runs nf:solve against a configurable set of synthetic or captured issues and reports success/failure metrics to validate autonomous issue resolution capacity.
out_of_scope: Improving or modifying the nf:solve algorithm or logic
Building a production issue collection system or real issue dataset
Performance optimization of formal verification runtime
Creating interactive UI for benchmark results visualization
Implementing machine learning models to predict solve success rates
nf/quick-397-build-a-command-to-run-nf-s.risk_reason: Feature task creating a new benchmark runner command touches multiple files across directories (likely source, test, and configuration files) without qualifying for low-risk criteria, and requires new tooling/infrastructure.
